name: Seedance 2.0 Fast
description: Faster variant of ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 video model. Trades some quality for speed while sharing the same multimodal architecture. Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, native audio generation, multimodal references (images, videos, audio), video editing, and video extension.

input.prompt: A golden retriever running through a field of sunflowers on a sunny day

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

input.prompt: A barista pouring latte art in a cozy coffee shop, close-up with shallow depth of field

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

aspect_ratio.description: Video aspect ratio. Ignored if an image is used.

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate audio with the video

image.description: Reference image (HTTP(S) URL or base64 data URI) for image-to-video

last_frame_image.description: Reference image (HTTP(S) URL or base64 data URI) for last-frame guidance. Only works if an image start frame is also given.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video to generate

reference_images.description: Reference images (1-4, HTTP(S) URLs or base64 data URIs) to guide video generation for characters, avatars, clothing, or environments. Cannot be used with 1080p resolution or first/last frame images.

reference_video.description: Reference video (HTTP(S) URL or base64 data URI) for style/motion guidance

watermark.description: Whether to add a watermark to the output video
